features.name: var port kind keyword in output port declaration
features.description: Code should include an output port declared with the explicit 'var' port kind keyword, as in 'output var', which specifies the port as a variable rather than a net per IEEE 1800-2012 section 23.2.2.3

features.name: always_comb driving output var port
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block that drives an output variable port, combining the 'var' port kind with combinational procedural assignment
features.snippet:
output var a, input b;
always_comb a = b;
